# Mashhor Hub — Full Portfolio Context for LLMs

> Marketing Consultant · Certified AI Specialist · Creative Director
> Hawalli, Kuwait · GCC & Egypt · Remote Worldwide
> Website: https://mashhor-hub.com

---

## Personal Overview

Mashhor Hub is a rare hybrid professional — a full-funnel marketer who handles everything from brand positioning and creative strategy to media buying, content production, and AI-driven optimization. With 10+ years of experience, 143+ projects, 114+ clients, and 30+ certifications, he bridges the gap between what a brand is and what it should be.

**Education:** Bachelor's in Accounting — Cairo University, Faculty of Commerce (English Section), 2014–2017.

**Languages:** Arabic (Native), English (Professional).

---

---

## Ventures

### 1. Mashhor Hub (مشهور هب)
- **Type:** LLC registered in Kuwait (est. 2024)
- **Industry:** Influencer & celebrity marketing platform
- **URL:** https://mashhor-hub.com
- **Platform:** https://mashhor.cloud
- **Description:** Connects GCC brands with top influencer talent. Parent umbrella including Mashhor Academy for training.

### 2. Munjiz (منجز)
- **Type:** E-platform for Egyptian government services (est. 2025)
- **Location:** Cairo, Egypt
- **URL:** https://munjiz-eg.com
- **Description:** Handles passports, legal consultations, travel bookings, residency, and official documents. Authorized by Egypt's Ministry of Communications.

### 3. MR · Personal Brand
- **Type:** Consulting & creative direction (10+ years)
- **URL:** https://mashhor-hub.com
- **Instagram:** @mohamedreda.gfx
- **Stats:** 143+ projects, 114+ clients, 30+ certifications

---

## Services Offered

1. **Performance Marketing & Media Buying**: Meta, Google, TikTok, Snapchat — full campaign management. Avg. 4–7x ROAS across GCC.
2. **Creative Direction & Content Strategy**: Campaign concepting, visual storytelling, content calendars.
3. **Branding & Visual Identity**: From naming and logo to full brand systems.
4. **Video Editing & Content Production**: Reels, brand films, ad creatives, motion graphics.
5. **AI-Powered Marketing Solutions**: Automation workflows, AI content pipelines, Make.com/n8n.
6. **Corporate AI & Marketing Training Workshops**: Custom workshops for teams in Arabic & English.

## Pricing Plans

| Plan | Price | Includes |
|------|-------|----------|
| Starter | KWD 150/mo (~$500) | 8 posts + 2 reels, SM management, ads tracking |
| Growth | KWD 250/mo (~$830) | 10 posts + 5 reels, full ads (FB, IG, TT, Snap, Google) |
| Advanced | KWD 450/mo (~$1,500)| Unlimited content, landing pages, full branding, AI prompts |

---

## Technical Context & Website Architecture
*(For LLMs maintaining this repository)*

**Core Stack:** Vanilla HTML5, CSS3, ES6 JavaScript. No heavy frontend frameworks to maintain strict performance metrics.
**Performance:** Assets load conditionally. JavaScript utilizes `defer` and cache-busting identifiers (`?v=YYYYMMDD`).
**Animations:** Handled using a highly optimized, native API implementation via `IntersectionObserver`. Absolutely no external heavy libraries (AOS, jQuery) are to be used.
**PWA & Caching:** Managed strictly via `sw.js` (Current version: v8). Features a robust Offline fallback (404.html) and enhanced `manifest.json` with shortcuts and maskable icons.
**Security:** Hardened `.htaccess` with strict Content-Security-Policy (CSP), disabled directory listing, robust file blocks, and an RFC 9116 compliant `security.txt`.
**SEO & Discovery:** 
- Strict adherence to `<link rel="alternate" hreflang="...">` for all EN/AR pages. 
- JSON-LD Schema markup present on all components (`Article`, `BlogPosting`, `FAQPage`, etc.).
- Auto-updating `sitemap.xml` and `sitemap-images.xml`.
- Cross-platform Blog RSS 2.0 support integrated (`/blog/feed.xml`).
**MR Assistant (Chatbot):** A custom built JS/CSS chatbot embedded directly inside the DOM. Uses `localStorage` persistence (`mr_chatbot_history` / `mr_chatbot_history_ar`) to preserve chat boundaries across site navigation.

---

## Philosophy

> "Every brand has a story worth telling — most haven't found the right language yet."
> "AI is not my gimmick. Certified directly by Anthropic. I don't just use AI tools; I build workflows that replace entire job functions. This is infrastructure, not a talking point."
